name: TweetClaw
description: Post tweets, reply, like, retweet, follow, DM from your chat - full X/Twitter automation powered by Xquik

apiKey.description: Xquik API key (get one at dashboard.xquik.com). Required for full access.

tempoPrivateKey.description: Tempo wallet private key for MPP pay-per-use mode. No account needed. Only 7 read-only X-API endpoints.

apiKey.label: Xquik API Key
apiKey.help: Full access to all 97 endpoints. Generate at dashboard.xquik.com.

tempoPrivateKey.label: Tempo Private Key (MPP)
tempoPrivateKey.help: Pay-per-use mode via Machine Payments Protocol. No account needed. 7 read-only X-API endpoints only. Requires mppx and viem packages.

baseUrl.label: API Base URL
baseUrl.help: Only change if using a self-hosted Xquik instance.

pollingInterval.label: Event Poll Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.help: How often to check for new monitor events. Default: 60 seconds.

pollingEnabled.label: Enable Event Notifications
pollingEnabled.help: Deliver monitor alerts and extraction completions to your chat.
